name: Defense Metals Corp.
name_former: Lac de Gras Larder Group Corp.
description: Defense Metals Corp. is a mineral exploration and development company focused on the acquisition, exploration, and development of mineral deposits containing metals and elements commonly used in the electric vehicle, green energy, defense, and national security sectors. The company's flagship project is the 100% owned Wicheeda Rare Earth Element (REE) Project, located near Prince George, British Columbia, Canada, which is being advanced towards producing high-purity rare earth elements.
